mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.sort, r.status, r.remark, r.data_scope, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_time FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.sort

SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != ''
